query:
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(*) AS totalProjects,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.suppressed = 0 OR p.suppressed IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unsuppressed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN (p.suppressed = 0 OR p.suppressed IS NULL) AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contactProjects cp2 
    JOIN contacts c2 ON c2.id = cp2.contactId 
    WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withSendReadyContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed = 0 OR p.suppressed IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeUnsuppressed
FROM projects p
WHERE p.projectType = 'opportunity'
GROUP BY p.priority
ORDER BY FIELD(p.priority, 'hot', 'warm', 'cold');

  SUM(CASE WHEN p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed = 0 OR p.suppressed IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS activeUnsuppressed
